Brightness.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Brightness of e.g. a dimmable light (LED, OLED, ...).
 
float64 brightness  # Ratio of the brightness to the maximum brightness (0.0 - 1.0).

fields.name: brightness
fields.comment: Ratio of the brightness to the maximum brightness (0.0 - 1.0).

BrightnessStamped.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Brightness of e.g. a dimmable light (LED, OLED, ...).

std_msgs/Header header  # stamp is the time the brightness was measured.
                        # frame_id is the location of the measurement (does not need to be TF frame, but it is recommended).
Brightness value  # Brightness.

fields.name: header
fields.comment: stamp is the time the brightness was measured.

ColorRGBAStamped.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# The color e.g. of an object or of a light like RGB LED, OLED, ...

std_msgs/Header header  # stamp is the time the color was measured.
                        # frame_id is the location of the measurement (does not need to be TF frame, but it is recommended).
std_msgs/ColorRGBA value  # The color.

fields.name: header
fields.comment: stamp is the time the color was measured.

ElectricCurrent.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague
 
# Single electric current value.
 
float64 current  # Current value (in Amperes).

ElectricCurrentStamped.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Single stamped electric current measurement.

std_msgs/Header header  # stamp is the time the current was measured.
                        # frame_id is the location of the current measurement (does not need to be a TF frame).
ElectricCurrentMeasurement measurement  # The measured current.

fields.name: header
fields.comment: stamp is the time the current was measured.

Heartbeat.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Heartbeat messages can be sent by sensor drivers to allow easy diagnostics of publishing rate without the need to
# subscribe their possibly very large sensor messages.
# The following naming convention should be used. If the sensor topic is TOPIC, the corresponding heartbeat messages
# should be published to TOPIC/heartbeat . If this convention is followed, diagnostic tools can automatically assign
# the heartbeats to the correct base topics.
 
std_msgs/Header header  # Header of a (possibly much larger) message to which the heartbeat belongs

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header of a (possibly much larger) message to which the heartbeat belongs

Power.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Mechanical or electrical power value.
 
float64 power  # Power value (in Watts).

PowerStamped.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Single power measurement.

std_msgs/Header header  # stamp is the time the power was measured.
                        # frame_id is the location of the power measurement (does not need to be a TF frame).
PowerMeasurement measurement  # The measured power.

fields.name: header
fields.comment: stamp is the time the power was measured.

PowerSwitchState.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# State of a power switch (a relay, a transistor, FET...).
 
bool on  # If true, the power switch is on, i.e. the electric path is connected.

fields.name: on
fields.comment: If true, the power switch is on, i.e. the electric path is connected.

PowerSwitchStateStamped.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# State of a power switch (a relay, a transistor, FET...).

std_msgs/Header header  # stamp is the time the power switch state was measured.
                        # frame_id is the location of the power switch (does not need to be TF frame).
PowerSwitchState state  # State of the power switch light.

fields.name: header
fields.comment: stamp is the time the power switch state was measured.

fields.name: state
fields.comment: State of the power switch light.

Voltage.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Single voltage value.
 
float64 voltage  # Voltage value (in Volts).

VoltageStamped.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Single voltage measurement.

std_msgs/Header header  # stamp is the time the voltage was measured.
                        # frame_id is the location of the voltage measurement (does not need to be a TF frame).
VoltageMeasurement measurement  # The measured voltage.

fields.name: header
fields.comment: stamp is the time the voltage was measured.

SetBrightness.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Set the brightness of e.g. a dimmable light.

Brightness value  # The requested brightness.
---
# If a failure occurs, the service server should throw an exception.

SetColor.raw:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Czech Technical University in Prague

# Set color of e.g. a color light (RGB LED, OLED...).

std_msgs/ColorRGBA color  # The requested color. All channels values 0.0 - 1.0.
                          # If this denotes the color of a (LED) light, black means either no light or actual
                          # black if the device can produce it.
                          # Some devices may use alpha e.g. as backlight intensity or as visual preview alpha,
                          # so rather set it to 1.0 if you don't know.
---
# If a failure occurs, the service server should throw an exception.

request_fields.name: color
request_fields.comment: The requested color. All channels values 0.0 - 1.0.
